name: drift-detection scan tracks repeated bypass count per source file across multiple offending lines
command:
mkdir -p src && printf 'a // rubric: ignore
b // rubric: ignore
c // rubric: ignore
' > src/repeat.js && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/skills/drift-detection/scan.sh" --paths src --out report.jsonl 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q '"count":3' report.jsonl && grep -q 'src/repeat.js' report.jsonl && echo flagged 1>&2
